message:
fix(runtime): replace anti-entropy proof surrogates with canonical MMR verification

Replace the placeholder non-empty/non-zero MMR proof check with canonical
mmr_proofs::verify_inclusion() delegation. TrustRecord now holds an
InclusionProof + marker_hash instead of raw Vec<[u8; 32]>. verify_mmr_proof()
takes an MmrRoot and returns Result for proper error propagation.

42 tests pass including 6 adversarial cases (forged root, wrong marker hash,
zero-filled proof, mismatched tree size, cross-epoch replay, regression for
non-empty check bypass).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
